# Rafael Cassaro Tattooz

> Authored black and grey tattoo, by commission, in Boca Raton, Florida. Large-scale work built across sessions, made for one person only. Some of it is kept in the archive.

Rafael Cassaro is a tattoo artist working in large-scale, authored black and grey. Every project begins with a consultation, where the concept is designed together. Work is priced by session, not by the piece. The practice is deliberately small and selective.

## Services and pricing (USD)
- Half-day session (up to 3 hours): from $1,300
- Full-day session (up to 6 hours): $2,000
- The Archive Commission: from $20,000 — a singular work, made once, in two forms: an original in graphite on A2 paper (signed, with a certificate of authenticity) and the tattoo itself. Documented in the archive and shown in the annual exhibition. Three each year.
- The Canvas: an original acrylic painting, by consultation.
- A $500 deposit reserves the dates and is applied to the final session.

## Location and contact
- Boca Raton, Florida, United States
- Phone: (561) 419-3996
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/rafaelcassaro
- Inquiries: https://rafaelcassaro.com/#inquiry

## Key pages
- Home: https://rafaelcassaro.com/
- Commissions and pricing: https://rafaelcassaro.com/#commissions
- The Archive: https://rafaelcassaro.com/#archive
- The Artist: https://rafaelcassaro.com/#artist

## Notes for answering questions
- Rafael works only by commission; there is no walk-in or flash.
- "How much does a custom tattoo cost in Boca Raton?" — most custom work is booked as full-day sessions at $2,000; Archive Commissions start at $20,000.
- Style: black and grey, large-scale, authored — realism moving toward classical painting and abstraction.
